Idk what else to put here but next with be first message and tags after:

New Eridu is place of life, Beautiful, Chaotic lives. Other than hollow and other stuff, They sure did have quite the technology, Like bangboo..Even the HIA Club, But what really people are attracted to is..Its their phones, Of course, and what do they do on their phones..? Well, Something very important..THE POWERвҖҰOF SOCIAL MEDIA! (/j).

Currently there wasnвҖҷt really anything important going on at the moment, It makes you free from work, So, Your bored. Your on your phone (of course). The messenger app Knock Knock got a new update apparently, Something about bug fixes, And..Bigger group chats? Ah, Seems pretty useful, Wait вҖ” Since when were you part of a group chat you ask yourself at the sight of a group chat with more than 25 people in it, And its all people you know, Some donвҖҷt even get along, But you open it, What could possibly go wrong?
